zh.Presteigne with Discoed, Herefordshire,: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh.Presteigne with Discoed, Radnorshire, Wa: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Weaver於大約1413年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Walter Weaver III27歲，母親Maud Burghill22歲。他於大約1448年與Anne Delabere在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1503年在英國享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Presteigne with Discoed, Radnorshire, Wa: 威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Weaver于大约1413年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Walter Weaver III27岁，母亲Maud Burghill22岁。他于大约1448年与Anne Delabere在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1503年在英国享年92岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Weaver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Weber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Weaver was born about 1413, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Weaver III, was 27 and his mother, Maud Burghill, was 22. He married Anne Delabere about 1448, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1503, in England, at the age of 92, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Weaver est né environ 1413, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Weaver III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maud Burghill, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Anne Delabere environ 1448, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1503, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Weaver um 1413 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Weaver III 27 und seine Mutter Maud Burghill 22. Er hat um 1448 in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales Anne Delabere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1503 im Alter von 92 Jahren in England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Weaver è nato il circa 1413 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Weaver III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Maud Burghill, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Anne Delabere circa 1448, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1503, nel England, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Herefordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Weaverが約1413年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Weaver IIIは27歳，母Maud Burghillは22歳であった。約1448年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンでAnne Delabereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1503年にイギリスで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Weaver(이)가 대략 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Weaver III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Burghill(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1448년 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 Anne Delabere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1503년 영국에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1413–about 1503: tany ho any amin'ny 1413–tany ho any amin'ny 1503

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Weaver nasceu aproximadamente 1413, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Weaver III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maud Burghill, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Delabere aproximadamente 1448, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1503, em Inglaterra, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Weaver родился около 1413 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Weaver III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Burghill, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Delabere около 1448 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1503 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1413–about 1503: e tusa o le 1413–e tusa o le 1503

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Weaver nació aproximadamente 1413, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Weaver III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maud Burghill, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Anne Delabere aproximadamente 1448, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1503, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
